info.title: CyberAgent Workbench Local API
info.description: Authenticated loopback-only API owned by the Go control plane. Read operations expose durable metadata; the separately authorized control capability only requests exact active-call cancellation.

tags.name: System
tags.description: API discovery, health, and contract metadata.

tags.name: Runs
tags.description: Durable Run state and Run-scoped projections.

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Bounded Agent graph and operator-gated delegation projections.

tags.name: Analysis
tags.description: Read-only Fan-out plans and execution summaries.

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Finding reports and redacted lifecycle evidence summaries.

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: Persisted Session metadata and redacted messages.

get.description: Returns API and application versions plus top-level resources.
Returns content-free Artifact metadata and its integrity hash.
Reads the current SQLite schema version without mutating state.
Returns one redacted structured Note.
Returns the raw deterministic OpenAPI 3.1 JSON document under the same authentication boundary.
Returns a bounded cursor page of durable Runs.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Returns Run, Mission, checkpoint, tool usage, token-free execution-lease metadata, and the read-only Plan/Delivery projection when present.

post.description: Persists an audit-first cancellation request bound to the exact active Supervisor and model attempt. The worker consumes it with its private execution lease; clients never provide a fencing token.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque operation key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Cancellation request accepted or idempotently replayed

get.description: Returns root and Specialist projections plus completion summaries without lease or fencing state.

post.summary: Cancel an active Specialist model call
post.description: Persists an audit-first cancellation request bound to one exact Specialist AgentAttempt and model attempt. Only the worker holding that Attempt's private Run lease can observe and apply it.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Opaque operation key; only a domain-separated digest is persisted

202.description: Cancellation request accepted or idempotently replayed

get.description: Returns metadata and hashes only; Artifact content is never returned by HTTP.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

parameters.name: source_id
parameters.description: Exact source proposal or invocation identity

get.description: Returns proposal, review, application, and latest scheduling summaries without operation digests or review reasons.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Returns the ordered append-only Run event stream.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Streams bounded durable Run events as SSE and resumes from a Run-bound cursor.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque Run-bound cursor from a previous SSE id; cannot be combined with Last-Event-ID

parameters.name: Last-Event-ID
parameters.description: SSE reconnect cursor from the final received frame; cannot be combined with cursor

get.description: Returns bounded plan metadata and the latest shard execution summary without file manifests or model report JSON.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Returns structured, redacted Run Notes.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

parameters.name: visibility
parameters.description: Repeat or comma-separate Note visibility values

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Repeat or comma-separate normalized Note tags

get.description: Returns bounded report counts and severity summaries without Finding narratives.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Returns Findings and evidence references while omitting operator reasons, Evidence notes, digests, and Artifact content.
Returns persisted redacted structured-memory tool rounds and calls.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Returns structured Work Board items.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Returns a bounded cursor page of persisted Sessions.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Returns Session metadata and its optional bound Run.
Returns persisted redacted messages.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Page size from 1 to 100; defaults to 50

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque cursor bound to this route and exact filter set

get.description: Returns one structured WorkItem.

BadRequest.description: Invalid path, query, method, or request body

Conflict.description: Idempotency key, Run, or active attempt changed

FailedPrecondition.description: The target model attempt is not active or cancellable

Forbidden.description: Request is outside the loopback security boundary

NotFound.description: Requested durable resource was not found

RequestEntityTooLarge.description: Control request body exceeded its hard limit

RequestTooLarge.description: Request target or query exceeded its hard limit

ResourceExhausted.description: Bounded response or resource limit was exhausted

BearerAuth.description: Process-scoped read token; never persisted by CyberAgent.

ControlBearerAuth.description: Distinct optional control token; cannot authorize read operations and is never persisted.
